Computer Organization and Architecture at UT


…a tough class but i definitely learned a lot

ended with a B+


including on my website bc the projects were pretty cool


Projects:


System Emulator (pipeline execution with forwarding and hazard control)


Dynamic Memory Allocator (custom malloc and free)


Assembly Coding Practice


C Coding Practice
